title: PostgreSQL malformed array literal error
symptom: When trying to upsert a JSONB array in PostgreSQL, an error 'malformed array literal' occurs due to improper escaping of characters.
not_this_if: Using valid JSON strings without escaped characters
root_cause: The error arises because PostgreSQL expects a specific syntax for JSONB arrays, and improperly escaped characters, such as quotes, lead to misinterpretation of the input as an array literal instead of valid JSON.
fix_steps: Use a valid JSON string instead of a JSONB array for insertion.
If using JSONB, ensure all characters are properly escaped according to PostgreSQL syntax.
agent_instruction: Convert your JSONB array to a valid JSON string or ensure proper escaping for PostgreSQL.
